case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. JESSICA D. SANCHEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JESSICA D. DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2017

DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 62280404) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-21-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $327.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $95.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62280404) AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JESSICA D.
